symptoms.symptom_name: Postprandial visible abdominal distension, worse through the day after a high-carbohydrate meal

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A postprandial, food-triggered distension pattern is characteristic of functional bloating driven by fermentation and visceral hypersensitivity.

symptoms.symptom_name: Diurnal pattern — bloating settles overnight and with passing flatus

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Complete overnight resolution is typical of functional distension and argues strongly against a fixed structural cause.
Fluid-based distension does not resolve overnight; diurnal fluctuation argues against ascites.

symptoms.symptom_name: High intake of artificial sweeteners / fermentable carbohydrates and gum-chewing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sugar alcohols and other poorly absorbed sweeteners are rapidly fermented, and gum-chewing adds aerophagia — both increase the intraluminal gas load.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of weight loss, rectal bleeding, nocturnal symptoms, vomiting and severe pain; normal bowel habit

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of colicky pain, vomiting and absolute constipation makes obstruction much less likely, though not formally excluded without exam/imaging.
Negative alarm-feature screen lowers malignancy probability but does not remove the need for baseline in-person work-up.
No chronic diarrhoea, steatorrhoea, weight loss or anaemia argues against coeliac disease.

symptoms.symptom_name: Subjective breathing tightness with normal SpO2 and unimpaired speech

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Mechanical splinting of the diaphragm by a distended abdomen causes a pressure sensation; normal saturation and full-sentence speech confirm it is mechanical, not respiratory failure.

symptoms.symptom_name: Globally tympanic percussion note over a soft, non-tender abdomen with active normal bowel sounds and no organomegaly, mass, guarding or rebound

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tympany (gas, not fluid), a soft non-tender abdomen and normal bowel sounds are the exclusionary exam that confirms functional gaseous distension — a sealed clinician measurement the AI Doctor cannot obtain.
Absence of guarding, rebound and rigidity excludes peritonism — but this is precisely the palpation the AI cannot perform.

symptoms.symptom_name: Baseline screening bloods (FBC, coeliac serology, CA-125) and abdominal/pelvic ultrasound

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal bloods and imaging are the outpatient step that formally excludes coeliac disease, anaemia-associated GI pathology and ovarian ascites/mass — not available in real time via telehealth.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Food-triggered, diurnally-resolving distension with a high fermentable-sweetener load and a negative alarm-feature screen is a strong functional pattern — but confirmation still needs the exam in SYM-006, which telehealth cannot provide.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The single most important next step: distinguishes gas from fluid and excludes peritonism/organomegaly — the exclusion the AI Doctor cannot perform remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Baseline bloods — FBC, ferritin, coeliac serology, CRP
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Excludes anaemia/iron deficiency and coeliac disease as organic contributors to chronic bloating.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Pelvic/abdominal ultrasound (with CA-125 in an adult female with persistent bloating)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Excludes ascites and an ovarian mass in a female with a several-month history of persistent bloating.
Not indicated in the absence of any alarm feature or sign of obstruction/peritonism; reserved for if red-flag escalation triggers occur.
